quest_first_morning.title: The First Morning
quest_first_morning.description: Oma Irmtrout needs bread, eggs, and milk. Visit Tante Enso to find them.

objectives.text: Talk to Oma Irmtrout
Get bread, eggs, and milk from Tante Enso
Return to Oma Irmtrout

vocabRewards.definition_en: a food made from flour and water
oval objects laid by birds, eaten as food

vocabRewards.example_en: Do you want milk in your coffee?

quest_shopping_list.title: The Shopping List
quest_shopping_list.description: Enzo at Tante Enso wants to test your food vocabulary. Name the items to get your groceries!

objectives.text: Talk to Enzo at Tante Enso
Pass the food vocabulary quiz
Collect the grocery items

vocabRewards.definition_en: a place where you buy things
vocabRewards.example_en: I go to the shop every day.
Do you like cheese on your bread?

vocabRewards.definition_en: a soft yellow food made from cream
vocabRewards.example_en: Put some butter on the bread.
I drink orange juice in the morning.

quest_kebab_order.title: The Kebab Order
quest_kebab_order.description: Mehmet at Columbus Doener challenges you to order a full meal in English. Numbers and polite words required!

objectives.text: Talk to Mehmet at Columbus Doener
Order food in English

vocabRewards.definition_en: a polite word when asking for something
a polite word after receiving something

quest_two_scoops.title: Two Scoops of English
quest_two_scoops.description: Rosa at Eiscafe La Rosa will give you ice cream, but only if you can name the flavors in English!

objectives.text: Talk to Rosa at Eiscafe La Rosa
Name ice cream flavors in English

vocabRewards.definition_en: a sweet brown food or flavor
a sweet flavor from a tropical plant

quest_official_form.title: The Official Form
quest_official_form.description: Klaus at the Star Administration has an English travel form. Fill it out correctly to get your Travel Permit!

objectives.text: Talk to Klaus at Star Administration
Fill out the English travel form

vocabRewards.example_en: My date of birth is January first.

quest_shopping_dialogue.title: What Do You Need?
quest_shopping_dialogue.description: Borla at LaBorla wants to practice shopping phrases with you. Ask about prices and sizes in English!

objectives.text: Talk to Borla at LaBorla
Practice shopping phrases

vocabRewards.definition_en: how big or small something is

quest_community_bulletin.title: Community Bulletin
quest_community_bulletin.description: Finn at the Jugendfeuerwehr found an English notice on the board. Help him understand it!

objectives.text: Talk to Finn at the Jugendfeuerwehr
Read the English noticeboard

vocabRewards.example_en: The meeting is at six o'clock.
We need a volunteer for Saturday.

quest_place_to_rest.title: A Place to Rest
quest_place_to_rest.description: Frau Mering runs FEWO Mering, a holiday home. Book a room in English and unlock it as a save point!

objectives.text: Talk to Frau Mering at FEWO Mering
Book a room in English

vocabRewards.definition_en: a part of a building with walls
vocabRewards.example_en: I would like a room for one night.

vocabRewards.definition_en: a small metal object to open a door

vocabRewards.example_en: I want to book a room, please.

quest_lets_play.title: Let's Play!
quest_lets_play.description: Max at the Spielplatz wants to be your friend! Introduce yourself in English and practice playground phrases.

objectives.text: Talk to Max at the Spielplatz
Practice introductions

vocabRewards.definition_en: a greeting when you meet someone
a person you like and trust

quest_finding_voice.title: Finding Your Voice
quest_finding_voice.description: Nicole the speech therapist will help you with English pronunciation. Master the tricky sounds: th, v, and w!

objectives.text: Talk to Nicole at the Sprachtherapie
Practice pronunciation patterns

vocabRewards.definition_en: the state of the sky and air

vocabRewards.example_en: Come with me to the park.

quest_perfect_cut.title: The Perfect Cut
quest_perfect_cut.description: Lea the hairdresser needs you to describe your ideal haircut in English. Use adjectives to get the perfect look!

objectives.text: Talk to Lea at the Friseur
Describe a haircut using adjectives

quest_morning_news.title: Morning News
quest_morning_news.description: Werner at the kiosk has an English newspaper. Read the headline and show him you understand!

objectives.text: Talk to Werner at the Kiosk
Read the English headline

vocabRewards.example_en: I read the newspaper every morning.

vocabRewards.definition_en: the title of a news story
